a list of vertices that are the direct predecessors of a

RETURN.content: a list of the vertices that are the direct successors of the specified vertex. If the graph is a multigraph vertices may appear more than once in the returned list.

RETURN.assertion: assert (methodResultID instanceof org.jgrapht.Graph) && ((org.jgrapht.Graph) methodResultID).isDirected() == false || methodResultID == args[0];
RETURN.content: an undirected view of the specified graph, if it is directed, or the specified graph itself if it is already undirected.

THROWS.description: if the graph is neither DirectedGraph nor UndirectedGraph.

THROWS.content: if the graph is neither DirectedGraph nor UndirectedGraph.
